base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_blinky_move — a character (playable) from 1980 pac man. Red ghost (Blinky / Shadow / Oikake-Akabei) — 2-frame body-wave cycle alternating bottom-fringe position. One sprite set per direction (right/left/up/down) with eyes-only direction-change. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red ghost (Blinky / Shadow / Oikake-Akabei) — 2-frame body-wave cycle alternating bottom-fringe position. One sprite set per direction (right/left/up/down) with eyes-only direction-change; body identical across dirs, pupils offset to indicate look-direction. Chases player directly
